title: Crisp Rasam Soup
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired soup with a crunchy twist. Perfect for a light and refreshing lunch.

ingredients.name: crisp
ingredients.notes: any type of crisp will work

ingredients.name: frais
ingredients.notes: such as cherry tomatoes or cucumber

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the crisp and sauté until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the frais and sauté for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the rasam paste and stir well to combine.
Pour in 4 cups of water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in the fromage until melted and combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional crisp if desired.
